intro: Master the Spectrum: A Minimalist Challenge of Pure Color and Memory
description:
The Essence of Pure Color Colorium is a minimalist experience stripped of all distractions. No lighting effects, no complex textures, and no shadows—just the raw power of color. It is designed for those who believe they have a "perfect eye" for the spectrum. Here, your only tools are your retinas and your focus. In a world filled with visual noise, Colorium challenges you to see the truth. Can you identify the finest shift in hue? Can you remember a color that has vanished?

Five Modes of Absolute Perception Colorium features five distinct game modes:
Memory Mode: Recall exact color placements in a hidden grid.
Find Odd: Spot the subtle outlier in a field of identical colors.
Find Different: Identify the microscopic shift in pigment between two tones.
Find Which Color is Changed: Track a single tile as it subtly transforms in real-time.
The Vanished Hue: Identify exactly which shade has been removed from the screen.

A Natural Diagnostic for Color Vision Colorium is a powerful tool for uncovering color vision deficiencies. As you progress through the game, subtle patterns in your performance can reveal conditions such as red-green color blindness, blue-yellow deficiency, or other forms of color perception impairment—challenges that many people live with without ever knowing. Colorium does not replace a clinical diagnosis, but it creates a uniquely honest mirror for your visual biology. If certain spectrums consistently challenge you, the game will make it visible.

Train Your Mind While You Play Beyond color, Colorium is a genuine workout for your cognitive abilities. Each session actively engages working memory as you retain and compare color sequences under pressure. The game sharpens selective attention, training your brain to filter out irrelevant visual information and lock onto meaningful differences. Over time, players report measurable improvements in focus, perceptual speed, and the ability to detect fine detail—skills that extend far beyond the game itself.

Zen Through Focus
Pure Minimalism: No light or shadows. Just flat color logic.
Calm and Focused: No leaderboards or pressure. A pure Zen experience.
Visual Calibration: Improve your "eye for detail" and chromatic sensitivity.
Atmospheric Clarity: Low-profile ambient soundtrack for a perfect flow state.

Enter the spectrum. Challenge your perception. Discover the true depth of color.
